mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO COACHING_MESSAGE ( MESSAGE_ID, USER_ID, THREAD_ID, ROLE, CONTENT, CATEGORY, ORIGINAL_AMOUNT, AVG_AMOUNT, ACCEPTED ) VALUES ( SEQ_COACHING.NEXTVAL, #{userId},
SEQ_COACHING.CURRVAL #{threadId} , #{role}, #{content}, #{category}, #{originalAmount}, #{avgAmount}, #{accepted} )
mapper.select: SELECT MESSAGE_ID, USER_ID, THREAD_ID, ROLE, CONTENT, CATEGORY, ORIGINAL_AMOUNT, AVG_AMOUNT, ACCEPTED, CREATED_AT FROM COACHING_MESSAGE WHERE THREAD_ID = #{threadId} ORDER BY MESSAGE_ID ASC

SELECT MESSAGE_ID, USER_ID, THREAD_ID, ROLE, CONTENT, CATEGORY, ORIGINAL_AMOUNT, AVG_AMOUNT, ACCEPTED, CREATED_AT FROM COACHING_MESSAGE WHERE USER_ID = #{userId} AND ROLE = 'NUDGE' ORDER BY MESSAGE_ID DESC FETCH FIRST 20 ROWS ONLY
